title: Admin Blog Frontend Refinement: Tags Mapping and Save Logic
description: Correct tag loading/mapping, switch to PUT by ID, send content_html, and verify publication date in UI.
acceptance_criteria: Tags correctly loaded from API and mapped for the form (post.tags.map(t => t.name))
Save operation uses PUT /api/v1/blog/posts/{post_id} instead of PATCH by slug
Request payload includes 'content_html' from TipTap editor
Publication date is visible in blog list if set
Local linting and type checking passed (npm run lint / vue-tsc)
